message:
test(models): add 42 unit tests for model registry + fix clippy in conformance

Models tests cover: supports_xhigh, clamp_thinking_level, ad_hoc_provider_defaults
(14 providers + aliases), ad_hoc_model_entry, merge_headers, resolve_value
(plain/empty/env/file/shell), resolve_headers, ModelRegistry get_available/error/load,
default_models_path, ModelsConfig/CompatConfig deserialization, apply_custom_models
replacement, OAuthConfig, and built-in model property verification.

Also fixes clippy errors in ext_conformance_shapes.rs (doc_markdown,
too_many_lines, redundant_clone, cast_possible_truncation, match_bool,
assigning_clones, manual_let_else, needless_collect, map_unwrap_or) and
extension_inclusion.rs (cast_possible_truncation/cast_sign_loss).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
